external_references.description: EnkiWhiteHat. (2025, December 16). Kimsuky Distributing Malicious Mobile App via QR Code. Retrieved January 8, 2026.
Kim, H., S2W TALON. (2025, March 13). Detailed Analysis of DocSwap Malware Disguised as Security Document Viewer. Retrieved January 12, 2026.

objects.description: [DocSwap](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9005) has registered the following intents to automatically execute MainService on device reboot: `android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED`, `android.intent.action.ACTION_POWER_CONNECTED`, and `android.intent.action.ACTION_POWER_DISCONNECTED`.(Citation: EnkiWhiteHat_KimsukyDOCSWAP_Dec2025)(Citation: S2W_DocSwap_Mar2025)
